lines.gurmukhi: ਊਤਮੁ ਊਚੌ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਗੁਣ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸੇਖ ॥
lines.translit: aootam aoochau paarabraham gun ant na jaaneh sekh |
lines.english: that the Supreme Lord God is the most sublime and lofty. Even the thousand-tongued serpent does not know the limits of His Glories.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰਦ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਸੁਕ ਬਿਆਸ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਤ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: naarad mun jan suk biaas jas gaavat gobind |
lines.english: Naarad, the humble beings, Suk and Vyaasa sing the Praises of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸ ਗੀਧੇ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਬੀਧੇ ਭਗਤ ਰਚੇ ਭਗਵੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: ras geedhe har siau beedhe bhagat rache bhagavant |
lines.english: They are imbued with the Lord's essence; united with Him; they are absorbed in devotional worship of the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਮਾਨ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਬਿਨਸਿਓ ਪਾਈ ਸਰਨਿ ਦਇਆਲ ॥
lines.translit: moh maan bhram binasio paaee saran deaal |
lines.english: Emotional attachment, pride and doubt are eliminated, when one takes to the Sanctuary of the Merciful Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਬਸੇ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal man tan base darasan dekh nihaal |
lines.english: His Lotus Feet abide within my mind and body and I am enraptured, beholding the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਭੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤੋਟਾ ਹਿਰੈ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: laabh milai tottaa hirai saadhasang liv laae |
lines.english: People reap their profits, and suffer no loss, when they embrace love for the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਟਿ ਖਜਾਨਾ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਹਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: khaatt khajaanaa gun nidh hare naanak naam dhiaae |6|
lines.english: They gather in the treasure of the Lord, the Ocean of Excellence, O Nanak, by meditating on the Naam. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਮੰਡਲ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਕਥਹਿ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਸਤਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant manddal har jas katheh boleh sat subhaae |
lines.english: In the gathering of the Saints, chant the Praises of the Lord, and speak the Truth with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਪਤਮਿ ਸੰਚਹੁ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਟੂਟਿ ਨ ਜਾਹਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sapatam sanchahu naam dhan ttoott na jaeh bhanddaar |
lines.english: The seventh day of the lunar cycle: Gather the wealth of the Naam; this is a treasure which shall never be exhausted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਐ ਏਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak man santokheeai ekas siau liv laae |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, the mind becomes contented, enshrining love for the One Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: santasangat meh paaeeai ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, He is obtained; He has no end or limitations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਤਜਹੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਭਜਹੁ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap tajahu gobind bhajahu saran parahu har raae |
lines.english: Renounce your selfishness and conceit, and meditate, vibrate on the Lord of the Universe; take to the Sanctuary of the Lord, our King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੈ ਸਫਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar man har japai safal janam paravaan |
lines.english: One who meditates on the Lord twenty-four hours a day - fruitful and blessed is his coming into the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਹਰੈ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਰੈ ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dookh harai bhavajal tarai man chindiaa fal paae |
lines.english: Your pains shall depart - swim across the terrifying world-ocean, and obtain the fruits of your mind's desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਸੋ ਸਖਾ ਮੀਤੁ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: so saajan so sakhaa meet jo har kee mat dee |
lines.english: He is your friend, your companion, your very best friend, who imparts the Teachings of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਰਨੈਹਾਰੁ ਪਛਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar sadaa sang karanaihaar pachhaan |
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, realize that the Creator Lord is always with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੇਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak tis balihaaranai har har naam japee |7|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice to one who chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਈਅਹਿ ਤਜੀਅਹਿ ਅਵਰਿ ਜੰਜਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar gun gaaeeeh tajeeeh avar janjaal |
lines.english: Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord twenty-four hours a day; renounce other entanglements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਟਮੀ ਅਸਟ ਸਿਧਿ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: asattamee asatt sidh nav nidh |
lines.english: The eighth day of the lunar cycle: The eight spiritual powers of the Siddhas, the nine treasures,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕੰਕਰੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦਇਆਲ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jamakankar johi na sakee naanak prabhoo deaal |8|
lines.english: The Minister of Death cannot even see that person, O Nanak, unto whom God is merciful. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਰੀਤਿ ਨਿਰੋਧਰ ਮੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: niramal reet nirodhar mant |
lines.english: pure lifestyle, the infallible Mantra,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਲ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸ ਸਦਾ ਆਨੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: kaval pragaas sadaa aanand |
lines.english: the opening of the heart-lotus, eternal bliss,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਪੂਰਨ ਬੁਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: sagal padaarath pooran budh |
lines.english: all precious things, perfect intellect,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਧਰਮ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sagal dharam pavitr isanaan |
lines.english: all Dharmic virtues, sacred purifying baths,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਜਨੁ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har bhajan poore gur sang |
lines.english: these are obtained by meditating, vibrating upon the Lord, Har, Har, in the Company of the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਤਰੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jap tareeai naanak naam har rang |8|
lines.english: You shall be saved, O Nanak, by lovingly chanting the Lord's Name. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਊਚ ਬਿਸੇਖ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh aooch bisekh giaan |
lines.english: the most lofty and sublime spiritual wisdom

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਬਿਸਾਰਿਐ ਨਰਕ ਸੁਰਗ ਅਵਤਾਰ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam bisaariai narak surag avataar |9|
lines.english: O Nanak, forgetting the Naam, he is reincarnated into heaven and hell. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਨਹ ਸਿਮਰਿਓ ਮੋਹਿਓ ਸੁਆਦ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: naaraaein neh simario mohio suaad bikaar |
lines.english: He does not remember the Lord in meditation; he is fascinated by the pleasures of corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉਮੀ ਨਵੇ ਛਿਦ੍ਰ ਅਪਵੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: naumee nave chhidr apaveet |
lines.english: The ninth day of the lunar cycle: The nine holes of the body are defiled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਪਹਿ ਕਰਤ ਬਿਪਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: har naam na japeh karat bipareet |
lines.english: People do not chant the Lord's Name; instead, they practice evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਹਿ ਪਰ ਦਰਬੁ ਉਦਰ ਕੈ ਤਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hireh par darab udar kai taaee |
lines.english: They steal others' wealth for the sake of their own bellies,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਤ੍ਰਿਅ ਰਮਹਿ ਬਕਹਿ ਸਾਧ ਨਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: par tria rameh bakeh saadh nind |
lines.english: They commit adultery, slander the Saints,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਨ ਸੁਨਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: karan na sunahee har jas bind |
lines.english: and do not listen to even a tiny bit of the Lord's Praise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਨਿਵਰੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਨ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: agan na nivarai trisanaa na bujhaaee |
lines.english: but the fire is not extinguished, and their thirst is not quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਮਰਿ ਜਮਹਿ ਅਭਾਗੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh bisarat mar jameh abhaage |9|
lines.english: O Nanak, forgetting God, the unfortunate people are born, only to die. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਏਹ ਫਲ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: har sevaa bin eeh fal laage |
lines.english: Without serving the Lord, these are their rewards.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸ ਦਿਸ ਖੋਜਤ ਮੈ ਫਿਰਿਓ ਜਤ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਤ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: das dis khojat mai firio jat dekhau tat soe |
lines.english: I have wandered, searching in the ten directions - wherever I look, there I see Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਬਸਿ ਆਵੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: man bas aavai naanakaa je pooran kirapaa hoe |10|
lines.english: The mind comes to be controlled, O Nanak, if He grants His Perfect Grace. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਨਾਮ ਜਪਿ ਲੀਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: man santokh naam jap leene |
lines.english: your mind will be content, as you chant the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸਮੀ ਦਸ ਦੁਆਰ ਬਸਿ ਕੀਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: dasamee das duaar bas keene |
lines.english: The tenth day of the lunar cycle: Overpower the ten sensory and motor organs;

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ਬੇਅੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa gun gaavai beant |
lines.english: With your tongue, sing the Glorious Praises of the Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਚਿਤਵੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਗਵੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: man meh chitavai pooran bhagavant |
lines.english: In your mind, remember the Perfect Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਨੀ ਪੇਖਤ ਸਾਧ ਦਇਆਲ ॥
lines.translit: nainee pekhat saadh deaal |
lines.english: with your eyes, behold the kind, Holy Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨੀ ਸੁਨੀਐ ਜਸੁ ਗੋਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: karanee suneeai jas gopaal |
lines.english: With your ears, hear the Praises of the Lord of the World;
